title: Processed data and scripts supporting the manuscript "Single-cell transcriptomics reveals immune suppression and cell states predictive of patient outcomes in rhabdomyosarcoma"
author: DeMartino, Jeff
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This submission contains the compiled count table, processed R objects and various scripts and output files accompanying our manuscript "Single-cell transcriptomics reveals immune suppression and cell states predictive of patient outcomes in rhabdomyosarcoma" (Nature Communications, 2023, https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-38886-8)
steps_raw: This submission contains the compiled count table, processed R objects and various scripts and output files accompanying our manuscript "Single-cell transcriptomics reveals immune suppression and cell states predictive of patient outcomes in rhabdomyosarcoma" (Nature Communications, 2023, https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-38886-8)
